'''鈭歴-f-t-s''' ('''kasaftesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:kno|kno]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-f-t-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kno|kno]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-f-t-s
|-
! Lemma
| kasaftesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisaftesoko|thisaftesoko]] || [[word:jisaftesoko|jisaftesoko]] || [[word:shisaftesoko|shisaftesoko]] || [[word:kisaftesoko|kisaftesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusaftesoko|thuthusaftesoko]] || [[word:jujusaftesoko|jujusaftesoko]] || [[word:shushusaftesoko|shushusaftesoko]] || [[word:kukusaftesoko|kukusaftesoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosaftesoko|thothosaftesoko]] || [[word:jojosaftesoko|jojosaftesoko]] || [[word:shoshosaftesoko|shoshosaftesoko]] || [[word:kokosaftesoko|kokosaftesoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosaftesoko|thosaftesoko]] || [[word:josaftesoko|josaftesoko]] || [[word:shosaftesoko|shosaftesoko]] || [[word:kosaftesoko|kosaftesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙saftesoko|th忙saftesoko]] || [[word:j忙saftesoko|j忙saftesoko]] || [[word:sh忙saftesoko|sh忙saftesoko]] || [[word:k忙saftesoko|k忙saftesoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasaftesoko|thasaftesoko]] || [[word:jasaftesoko|jasaftesoko]] || [[word:shasaftesoko|shasaftesoko]] || [[word:kasaftesoko|kasaftesoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
